summary: Journey page right rail redesign (Coach Watch intelligence layer) tested successfully. All 19 core tests passed. Coach Watch card renders at top of right rail with status headline, status pill, 2x2 stats grid, recommended action, CTAs (Email now, Create follow-up), and collapsible Recent Signals section. Right rail sections follow correct hierarchy: Coach Watch > Coaching Staff > Communication & Activity > Intelligence > AI Insights.

issues: Console errors for external university logo resources (CORS blocked) - cosmetic only, not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: CoachWatchCard.js interpretSignals() function correctly converts raw signals into human-readable status, trend, and recommendations
Right rail section order is correct: Coach Watch (1) > Coaching Staff (2) > Communication & Activity (3) > Intelligence (4) > AI Insights (5)
data-testid attributes properly implemented for all interactive elements
Signal-aware relationship notes per coach in Coaching Staff section working correctly
AI Insights section shows context-aware helper text for all 3 buttons
seed_data_creation: Used existing data - Stanford (0 outreach, shows 'Relationship forming'/'Early stage'), Emory (has outreach, shows 'Momentum is stable'/'Stable')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Journey page Coach Watch redesign complete. Key test IDs: coach-watch-card, coach-watch-status-pill, coach-watch-headline, coach-watch-summary, coach-watch-stats, coach-watch-recommendation, coach-watch-ctas, coach-watch-email-btn, coach-watch-followup-btn, coach-watch-signals-toggle, coach-watch-signals-list, coaches-sidebar, communication-activity-card, intelligence-section, ai-section. The interpretSignals() function in CoachWatchCard.js drives all the status/trend/recommendation logic based on signals data.
